skills.name: Unbind
skills.description: Disconnect all links. From level 2, damages proportionally to the skill level and Physical Attack when the linked enemy is unlinked.
skills.effect_text:
Disconnect all links at once.
Discover more
Respiratory Conditions
Doll
Maps
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Physical Link
skills.description: Link the caster and nearby party members to share the damage received. Linked target divides the #{CaptionRatio}#% of damage received by the number of linked targets. Does not stack with Lifeline, and can be removed by the Unbind skill. Cooldown will be applied when the link is removed.
skills.effect_text: Decreases damage by 1% according to the skill level

skills.name: Joint Penalty
skills.description: Links enemies to attack all at once.
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
Maps
Coffee
coffee
Maximum Link Numbers: CaptionRatio
Count Limit: CaptionRatio2
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Hangman's Knot
skills.description: Gathers the targets linked with Joint Penalty into one area by tightening the link, and damage.
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
coffee
Doll
Respiratory Conditions
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 10
Damage Increases by CaptionRatio %
[Bind]Duration: 2 seconds

skills.name: Lifeline
skills.description: Shares your stats partially with your allies. Does not stack with Physical Link, can be removed with Unbind skill. Cooldown will be applied when the link is removed.

skills.name: Electric Shock
skills.description: Connect to a single target and deliver Lightning damage. Cannot be used on multiple targets at a time. Can be canceled by the Unbind skill.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Duration: CaptionRatio seconds

attributes.name: Physical Link: Defense
attributes.description:
* Increases physical defense by [attribute level] *5% when [Physical Link] is active

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Joint Penalty: Increased Nullification
attributes.description: * Decreases the chance to nullify attacks from enemies affected by [Joint Penalty] by 5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Electric Shock: Physical Pressure
attributes.description:
* Decreases Physical Defense of enemy under [Electric Shock] by 10%

* Increases SP consumption by 25%

attributes.name: Electric Shock: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Electric Shock] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Joint Penalty: Chain Heart
attributes.description:
* [Joint Penalty] changes to a skill that connects a single target to yourself

* The target connected will receive 5% increased damage to caster's attacks. The caster recovers HP as much as 1.5% of the dealt damage by 50% chance

* Duration: 15 seconds

* Cooldown increases by 30 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Electric Shock: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Electric Shock] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hangman's Knot: Mine
attributes.description:
Original effect is removed

* Install mine in front

* Mine remains for 15 seconds

* Enemy who stepped on the mine gathers to where it stepped the mine with allies around and is affected by Hangman's knot debuff

* Does not pull Boss or stationary monsters

attributes.name: Joint Penalty: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the total damage of [Joint Penalty] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hangman's Knot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hangman's Knot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hangman's Knot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Hangman's Knot] by 1.25% per attribute level
